title: hieracium pilosum subsp. padolanum
intro: Hieracium pilosum subsp. padolanum, also known as Hieracium pilosella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Hieracium pilosum subsp. padolanum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pilosum subsp. padolanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
